title: cyperella campestris
intro: Cyperella campestris, also known as Field Horsetail, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. It is a medicinal plant that has been used for centuries to treat various health conditions, including kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and respiratory issues, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to improve kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of cystitis. Cyperella campestris can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts can also be found in supplement form, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
